senses.example: Mary entertained us to dinner last night. // She entertains a great deal.
senses.example_zh: 玛丽昨晚设宴款待了我们。她常常请客。

senses.def_en: to hold the attention of sb. with sth. amusing
senses.example: We hired a magician to entertain the children at the party.
senses.example_zh: 我们雇了一个魔术师在派对上逗孩子们开心。

derivatives: entertainer n. 演艺人员;款待者
entertaining a. 使人得到娱乐的

entries.mnemonic: re(again)+creat(e)(产生)+ion→一再产生乐趣→消遣

senses.example: Karaoke is many young people's favorite recreation.
senses.example_zh: 唱卡拉OK是许多年轻人喜欢的娱乐活动。

senses.def_en: free time when one is not working
senses.example: I have no leisure for playing cards.

senses.def_en: enjoyable activities that you do when you are not working
senses.example: He lived a life of leisure on a handsome income.
senses.example_zh: 他凭借一笔可观的收入过着悠闲的生活。

derivatives: 【短语】at leisure 闲暇时;从容不迫地：He leant on the chair and began his lecture at leisure. 他靠在椅子上开始从容地进行他的演讲了。

senses.def_en: to state to be true, esp. when open to question
senses.example: He claimed that he hadn't done it, but I didn't believe him.
senses.example_zh: 他声称没有做这件事，可是我不相信他。

senses.example: She could have claimed the cost through her insurance.
senses.example_zh: 她本可以通过保险索赔。

senses.def_en: to deserve or call for; require
senses.example_zh: 这事需要我们予以注意。

derivatives: 【短语】lay claim to 声称对…有权利：If the land really belongs to you, why don't you lay claim to it? 如果这块地真正属于你，为什么你不据理力争呢？
【用法】该词表示"声称"时,可跟不定式或 that 从句,也可以用 it 作形式主语(It is claimed that...)。

senses.def_en: to demand the restoration or return of sth.
senses.example: I have tried to reclaim my money without success.
A legend goes that Holland reclaims more land from the sea than its original size.
senses.example_zh: 传说荷兰填海造地获得的土地面积比它原来的国土面积还大。
从废物中回收有价值的材料

senses.def_en: to say sth. suddenly and loudly because you are surprised, angry, or excited
senses.example: The little girl exclaimed in delight when she saw the presents. // He exclaimed that he was hungry.
senses.example_zh: 小女孩一见到礼物就高兴得叫了起来。他喊说他饿了。

derivatives: exclamation n. 呼喊;惊叹,感叹词

entries.mnemonic: pro(before)+claim(呼喊)→在众人前面大叫→宣告

senses.def_en: to announce officially and publicly; declare
senses.example: The government proclaimed a state of emergency.
